programme.title: Rollin Plains
programme.desc: Its cattlemen versus sheepmen and Trigger Gargan appears to be the leader of the gang causing the trouble But unknown to Ranger Tex Lawrence the respected town citizen Barrow is the boss and is tipping off the gang as to the Rangers activities

programme.title: Meatballs
programme.desc: Wacky hijinks of counselors and campers at a less-than-average summer camp

programme.title: Invincible Super Chan
programme.desc: Invincible Super Chan

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Oklahoma Cyclone
programme.desc: A search for his missing father prompts a cowboy to infiltrate a gang of desperadoes

programme.title: Daniel Boone Trailblazer
programme.desc: Daniel Boone leads settlers into Kentucky but must battle Shawnee Indians who have been persuaded by a French renegade that Boone and the settlers are there to kill them and steal their land

programme.title: Vietnam Nurses
programme.desc: Vietnam Nurses is a 2005 television documentary directed by Polly Watkins It tells the story of six Australian Army nurses who served in a field hospital in Vietnam between the years 1962 and 1972

programme.title: Battlefield Vietnam 2
programme.desc: Part 2 The Undeclared War

programme.title: Operation Valkyrie - The Plot To Kill Hitler
programme.desc: Operation Valkyrie The Plot To Kill Hitler is the definitive film on Claus Schenk Graf von Stauffenberg and the ‘Valkyrie’ conspiracy to assassinate Hitler on 20th July 1944 Produced in collaboration with the official German Foundation dedicated to the memory of the conspirators it features testimonials and eyewitness accounts from all of the aristocratic families involved in the plot including the last living conspirator to escape Hitler’s wrath and Maria Countess von Stauffenberg who knew Claus all her life

programme.title: Whos Sorry Now
programme.desc: During the Second World War the British commander of Singapore believed it to be an impregnable fortress until a numerically inferior Japanese Army overran it Similarly 12 years on the French lost the mountain garrison at Dien Bien Phu after failing to anticipate the resourcefulness of General Giap and his Vietmanese peasant army

programme.title: The Underground War
programme.desc: Part one of a two-part documentary about networks of underground tunnels built on the front lines in the First World War During World War One a barbaric war was fought deep beneath the trenches in a maze of tunnels and dugouts over 10 metres underground

programme.title: Great Battles Of The Great War -The Somme
programme.desc: The 1916 Somme offensive was one of the largest and bloodiest battles of the First World War 1914-18 The opening day of the attack 1 July 1916 saw the British Army sustain 57000 casualties the bloodiest day in its history

programme.title: Great Battles Of The Great War - Gallipoli
programme.desc: On 29 October 1914 two former German warships the Ottoman conducted the Black Sea raid in which they bombarded the Russian port of Odessa and sank several shipsthe Ottomans entered the war and began the Caucasus campaign against Russia The British briefly bombarded forts in Gallipoli invaded Mesopotamia and studied the possibility of forcing the Dardanelles

programme.title: The Long Shadow
programme.desc: Marking the centenary of World War One historian David Reynolds explores the enduring shadow the conflict has cast over Britain and Europe in the century that followed Travelling to locations across Europe from Slovenia to the Sudetenland Belfast to Berlin David Reynolds traces the war’s legacy arguing that it unleashed forces we still grapple with today This remarkable series also looks again at how the experience of war haunted the generation who lived through it in particular the soldiers who survived it – dynamic characters such as Benito Mussolini Eamon de Valera Philippe Petain James Ramsey MacDonald and Thomas Masaryk Reynolds examines how these men shaped the peace that followed war often in unpredictable ways

programme.title: Desert Generals
programme.desc: Britain would have lost her empire and the war in 1942 had Axis forces beaten the British army in the Middle East Tim Collins re-investigates Britain’s critical desert campaign and the controversial battle tactics needed to take on the unbeaten Panzer army in total war preventing Hitler from gaining Egypt Iraq and the oilfields Foreshadowing current world events this oil-rich region was crucial to the war effort These are the World War II battles that shaped the Middle East and created the world in which we live today

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A couple move into an old house that is supposedly haunted but the wife soon realizes just whos haunting the house Later another couple move into the house and form an unusual relationship with the moving man

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: In Los Angeles aspiring screenwriter Edward Foster from Indiana has a crush on his neighbor Miranda Singer However bimbo Miranda is a gold digger who does not give Edward any attention His unrequited love is noticed by his creepy landlord Mr Stronham who offers Edward a love potion in order to seduce Miranda Will the potion work

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A sadistic serial killer has unforeseen complications when pursued by a determined motorcycle cop in a barren desert

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome ambitious greedy Jeff Boder and his wealthy older wife Jackie Winslows cynical stepdaughter Pamela become lovers and conspire to kill Jackie using cursed voodoo-like dolls

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married sleazy advertising executive and music producer Bob Ames finds gorgeous seductive Cathie Marks hiding in his cabin in the woods during a rainstorm Is she a dream come true or something more sinister and dangerous

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Tired and worn out Eric accepts the hospitality of an old man at his home in the woods He becomes attracted to a young woman named Margaret but he fears that he may be responsible for a series of brutal murders in the area

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick and Natalie are puzzled by the rapid aging of a murder victim

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A dentist uses a cursed electric chair to seek revenge against those who wronged him

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: In this follow-up to the Prime Cut episode a group of recovering cannibals have a relapse and make the unfortunate decision to eat an intruder whos been contaminated with an alien disease

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways find two crates of silent film equipment in a sunken boat in the lagoon The Professor then comes up with the idea to make a film telling their story send it out on a raft and hope for rescue

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa solicits George MacMichaels help in turning the tables on two swindlers who convinced him to pay 35 for a worthless dog but he begins to have a change of heart when he discovers that Little Luke has become quite attached to the animal

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The rest of the McCoys find themselves torn over what to do about musically-challenged Lukes determination to enter an amateur singing contest

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Smart is hypnotized to kill the Chief during their nightly game of chess

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max and Fang investigate an animal spa where other agents dogs killed them after visiting it

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ Callie and Samantha stumble upon Steigers pet project a call girl operation run out of a dating service that blackmails its clients with compromising photographs But SCAT isnt the only party interested in getting that briefcase of evidence back from BJ

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Its Rogers birthday and hes angry with Mister Ed for eating apples from his trees

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilber enters into a televised debate against a respected member of the community who wants to ban horses from the neighborhood

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: As the Hammelburg Underground lodges a complaint against Hogans success Klink finds himself caught between the Gestapo and the Wehrmacht each trying to take over Stalag 13

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan is stymied over how to rescue a captured member of the underground until a potential diversion appears in the form of an old WWI buddy of Sgt Schultz

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Complications develop when McHale and the 73 crew go after a Japanese pilot known as Washing Machine Charlie who has been attacking the Taratupa base on a daily basis

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton suspects McHale and the 73 Crew of consorting with the enemy when a Japanese radio announcer broadcasts personal details about Binghamton that only someone close to him would know

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomers favorite actress visits the base

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer gets assigned to MP duty

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A Howell Industries stock collapse leaves the Howells broke The fellow castaways try to cheer them up and try to teach them how to live like the working class

programme.title: Vegas
programme.desc: While the sheriffs office investigates a murder connected to a divorce ranch an old flame pays a visit to Ralph and Mia tells her dad about her relationship with Jack Meanwhile Vincent discovers that his wife is the rat

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Freeways got a new girlfriend and when her master is killed Freeway disappears with the gun -- but doesnt have it when he gets home

programme.desc: Newhart - 708

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Destiny annoys Mitch and Garner by relating her visions of a series of murders they are investigating until she sees that Ryan is the next victim

programme.title: OPReEpisode801SD
programme.desc: OPReEpisode801SD

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: The Presidents Plane Is Missing
programme.desc: An American President stumbles upon a secret world-threatening crisis

programme.title: Runaway
programme.desc: A group of skiers are trapped inside a runaway train hurtling down a mountainside

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: In the series pilot episode cousins Bo and Luke Duke intercept Hazzard County Sheriff Rosco P Coltranes illegal shipment of slot machines then plan to use the proceeds to donate to the Hazzard County Orphanage in Roscos name to ensure his win in an upcoming election against a corrupt opponent

programme.title: Hercules 219
programme.desc: Hercules 219

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A Jaridian probe lands on Earth and begins sucking energy from the Comonality The Taelons use humans in a near-death state to keep their connection while Lili and Sandoval try to find out what is draining the energy

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens plan to clone a popular motivational speaker in order to control the minds of the rich and powerful Suzanne and Harrison plan to capture an alien drone

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane experiments with artificial earthquakes

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Tressa is taken hostage by a man with a score to settle with Arcane

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Some subterranean miner start chanting for a planet that will cause the Moon to pass through a nebula deadly to those living at Moonbase Alpha

programme.title: Battletruck
programme.desc: Post World War III futuristic tale of collapsed governments bankrupt countries heralding a new lawless age

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Daisy learns that Jessi Colter has recorded a song she wrote One problem Wheres the royalties shes due Thats what Bo and Luke try to find out as they infiltrate Hazzard County Commissioner Boss JD Hoggs record piracy operation

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: When the brother of a cop is killed along with the mobster he was working for the young officer is assigned to work undercover as a bookie to find out who ordered the hit Stone who is ordered to tell no one else about the mans assignment is concerned that the officer is too concerned with revenge to handle the job effectively

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force takes on the absolute ruler of a Middle East nation who is running a secret slave market Barney poses as a slave part of an effort to construct a replica of the slave cells before escaping Phelps poses as a slave trader and Rollin as an Interpol investigator Finally Cinnamon will be the bait for the trap The ruler of the country has a brother who married a British wife Amara The brother if he assumed power would abolish slavery in the country -- but he has accepted assurances that slavery doesnt exist there As part of the plan Willy abducts Amara and she is put in the IMF replica of the slave cell

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: The police are looking for a young fugitive who was dating the daughter of a Hungarian family that Dr Kimble is staying with As the police stake out their residence Dr Kimble discovers her father is also running from a crime he was accused of

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: The Barkleys are stranded out of all places in the desert Making it difficult to survive the heat no water and hard to put up with each other

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: After a close friend of Cheyenne is killed during the escape of bank robbers Cheyenne and Smitty track the band of outlaws across the border to a small Mexican village The band has taken over the town after killing 14 young men there

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: No Retreat No Surrender
programme.desc: After his father is abused by some thugs a teenager considers Bruce Lees spirit as his teacher Later he trains to become a martial arts professional to avenge his fathers humiliation

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.desc: After an oil company plane crashes in the Sahara the survivors are buoyed with hope by one of the passengers an airplane designer who plans for them to build a flyable plane from the wreckage

programme.title: Genghis Khan
programme.desc: During the thirteenth century the shy Mongol boy Temujin Carlo Cura becomes the fearless leader Genghis Khan Omar Sharif who unites all Mongol tribes and conquers most of Asia Europe and the Middle East

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 48 continues with more action packed MMA! We kick off this show with a great amateur fight between Dale Tallman and Chris Smeltzer. Following is the Main event of the evening, a professional Light Heavyweight Title Fight between UFC Veteran Rodney Wallace and TUF finalist Dan Spohn. You are in for five rounds of MMA action, so do not miss it!

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Artem Frolov v. Talekh Nadzhafadze

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 48 continues with some of the best fights in MMA! Mitch Carlson is welcomed back to HK cage by John "" The Dragon"" Nguyen in the amateur matchup of the night. Following are pros TJ Laramie, who prefers taking the fight standing, vs. Yvon ""Black Mamba"" Agenord, with a strong Jiu Jitsu background. This episode is rounded out by an entertaining pro contest between two MMA heavyweight veterans: Lee Mein vs. Lloyd Marshbanks.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Chris Smith v. Gareth Millar

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hicham Achalhi v. Andre Schmeling

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: One of the most experienced fighters in the series, Nick Thompson has the scars to prove it. Ansar Chalangov will be looking to come out hard for the Russians.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Jerad Meyer v. Zach Snyder.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Mohammed Jaraya v. Redouan Laarkoubi

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Nick Agallar v. Nardu Debrah

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Athens, Greece on July 28, 2018, Karate Combat: Olympus is the second event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held in the ancient Zappeion Courtyard where the first modern Olympic Games took place in 1896. On the Main Card: “Hurricane” Davy Dona of France versus Jerome “The Brown Bear” from the UK. The co-main event features Morocco’s Achraf Ouchen versus Ecuadorian Franklin Mina. Other fighters include Deivis Ferraras of Dominican Republic, Wellington Barbosa of Brazil, and Yaser Sahintekin of Turkey.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Rene Hoppe v. Ilya Bochkov

programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Neron captures the Herculoids to fight gladiatorial battles in his arenaThe Temple of Trax seems to be abandoned In reality the high priest has a plan to kidnap Tara and sacrifice her for the return of Trax after 2000 years

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: While teaching the cat people of a planet war strategy Oon wanders from lecture to lecture feeling unneeded and worthless Gillian discovers the planet houses a Nightwalker which is kept behind enormous tall doors and sealed with a gold symbol

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Unknown to Herc he falls into a trap set by Saw Boss when he wins a bet and the map to Dream World Helicia keeper of Dream World must accept them or face destruction from Saw Boss Everything goes beautifully

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Simon gets shot by a love-at-first-sight arrow and falls in love with Mother Brain

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: After the Computer Mind Mirror of Mother Brain says that Princess Lana is the most beautiful of them all the Eggplant Wizard makes a poison apple that will make Princess Lana fall asleep

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Dungeon Master is captured by an evil lord working for Venger The kids must find Dungeon Master and free him before its too late

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids learn of a magic river that can get them home On their way to the river however Eric accidentally turns himself into an ugly bogbeast The team must reverse the spell on Eric before the rivers magic runs out

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget has a double mission not only to retrieve a pearl necklace but also to stop the gang from making an alliance with Chow

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget and Penny are in Italy However Cheif Quimby gives Gadget an assignment It tells him that DrClaw is planning on stealing a priceless artifact known as the Golden Pizza However Gadget has to join an opera to find and stop the MAD agents from stealing the Golden Pizza Plus another agent is planning to use his singing plant to help DrClaw steal the Pizza Gadget must stop DrClaw from stealing the Golden Pizza and destroy the singing plant

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegades lure Leader-1 Turbo and Scooter into a trap full of hungry Zods

programme.title: Challenger of the GoBots
programme.desc: A damaged Turbo is repaired by two teenagers who unaware hes a GoBot enter him into a Grand Prix race; when the Renegades spot him the race turns into a demolition derby

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Oton leads the Time Creatures from the future on a mission to eliminate the HerculoidsThe Viking-like Raider Apes led by Gotron raid a village looking for gold Zandor comes to the rescue
